steps.t: The entrance to the Den of Pughlak can be found in the Gloomingtarn. You should further explore where the influenced goblins are camped.
Complete 'Den of Pughlak' on any difficulty. Use the Instance Finder to enter the Den of Pughlak.
Orti can be found at Watchers' Roost in the Gloomingtarn. You should return to Watchers' Roost and talk to Orti.
